SEOCORE Fixture Secondary Heading

This fixture exists for deterministic parity checks. It keeps markup stable while exposing enough SEO, AI visibility, mobile, security, and linking conditions to exercise rule output.

Content stays deliberately thin. Structure stays deliberately imperfect. Output should stay mechanically identical while Phase 3 splits rule modules.
